title: Flow Matching Language Model for Text Generation
author: vukadinovic936

data.description: Replaces causal autoregressive GPT with a non-causal transformer for flow matching over token embeddings.
Injects sinusoidal timestep embeddings through an MLP and adds them to sequence positions at each layer.

novel_contributions: Flow matching language model replacing autoregressive next-token prediction
Continuous denoising objective over token embeddings conditioned on source context
Combined velocity-field MSE loss with cross-entropy anchor loss
Bidirectional transformer with timestep conditioning for text generation
Monte Carlo BPB evaluation over multiple noise levels
